Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

Class AbstractObjectValidator<S,​T>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidator<S,​T>
Type Parameters:
S - the type of validator returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being validated
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,​T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractArrayValidator, AbstractBooleanValidator, AbstractCollectionValidator, AbstractComparableValidator, ClassValidatorImpl, InetAddressValidatorImpl, MapValidatorImpl, ObjectValidatorImpl, OptionalValidatorImpl, PathValidatorImpl, StringValidatorImpl, UriValidatorImpl, UrlValidatorImpl
public abstract class AbstractObjectValidator<S,​T>
extends Object
implements ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,​T>
Default implementation of ExtensibleObjectValidator.
